title: webera helferi
intro: Webera helferi, also known as the Elf or Helfer's Webera, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antidiabetic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Webera helferi include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve insulin sensitivity, and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for diabetes and other related conditions. Webera helferi is typically prepared as a herbal tea, and its leaves can also be dried and used in capsule or tincture form for its medicinal properties.
